name: Vanilla Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs into yolks and whites.
2. Beat the egg yolks until smooth.
3. Gradually add half of the powdered sugar, whisking continuously.
4. Set aside to cool slightly.
5. In a separate bowl, whip the heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold in the remaining powdered sugar and vanilla extract until combined.
7. Divide the mousse mixture into ice cube trays with bars removed.
8. Cover the trays and place them in the freezer.
9. Allow to set completely before serving at room temperature.
